content: Episodic memory in neural architecture planning agents can be repurposed as an intrinsic curiosity signal for cutting-edge 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents, where under-explored past planning trajectories are prioritized for re-sampling instead of relying on traditional ICM or RND novelty modules. This creates a self-reinforcing active learning loop that uses the agent's existing episodic planning storage to eliminate the overhead of separate curiosity estimation.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
